topStories.title: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu declares Iran can't enrich uranium or build missiles anymore
topStories.description: Earlier Israeli and US actions, including strikes in June 2025, damaged major uranium enrichment sites like Natanz and Fordow, rendering them largely inoperable.

topStories.title: Trump defends $200B Pentagon request for Iran war; calls it ‘small price’ for national security
topStories.description: “This is a very volatile world,” Trump said from the Oval Office. “The emergency spending would be a very small price to pay to ensure the nation’s military stays in top shape.”

topStories.title: Are US and Israel aligned on Iran war? Deciphering Trump's post after gas field attacks
topStories.description: What does Trump's Truth Social post after gas field attacks tell us about US-Israeli alignment?

topStories.title: War With Iran Could End "Faster Than People Think": Netanyahu
topStories.description: Israeli President Benjamin Netanyahu said on Thursday that he believed the war in Iran could finish sooner than "people think".

topStories.title: US Approves Over $16 Billion In Arms Sales To Gulf Nations Hit By Iran War
topStories.description: The biggest single sale is of lower-tier air and missile defense sensor radars, which are designed to track high-speed targets and give data to a missile defense network, to Kuwait for $8 billion.

topStories.title: Hegseth Warns Of "Largest Strike Package" Against Iran, Says US Is Winning
topStories.description: "Epic Fury is different. It's laser-focused. It's decisive. Our objectives, given directly from our America First President, remain exactly as they were on Day One...We're winning -- decisively and on...

topStories.title: Trump Says Told Netanyahu Not To Attack Iran Gas Fields
topStories.description: Trump insisted on social media overnight that he "knew nothing" about Wednesday's strike by Israel on the South Pars gas field in Iran, which retaliated to the attack by hitting Qatari energy sites.

topStories.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) unrelenting in demand for six seats, stalemate in talks with DMK continues
topStories.description: The DMK’s argument is that it cannot part with more seats as it has accommodated additional parties in the alliance and has already given three more seats to the Congress.

topStories.title: Received consular access plea for six Ukrainian nationals: MEA
topStories.description: Ministry of External Affairs says the Ukrainians and an American were found “wanting” of the required permits for visiting Mizoram

dailyNews.title: Netanyahu Says Israel Will Stop Attacks On Iranian Gas Field
dailyNews.description: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu said that at the request of President Trump, Israel will hold off on any further attacks on the Iranian gas field.

dailyNews.title: US approves $16.5bn arms deal to Gulf states amid rising Iran tensions
dailyNews.description: The proposed deal includes the sale of drones, missiles and radars for Gulf allies, including UAE, Kuwait and Jordan.

dailyNews.title: Congress, Raijor Dal Finalise Assam Polls Alliance After Several Deadlocks
dailyNews.description: An MoU formalising the alliance between the two parties was signed on Thursday, marking a significant political development ahead of the 2026 Assembly polls.

dailyNews.title: Qatar PM on Iran attacks: ‘Wisdom seems to be lacking these days’
dailyNews.description: Qatar’s prime minister has said Iran’s claims that it is targeting US bases is “unacceptable and unjustified”.

dailyNews.title: US' TikTok-Style Iran War Clips Spark Backlash For Trivialising Conflict
dailyNews.description: Across its social media platforms, the administration has pushed out high-energy clips that cut between actual explosions in Iran and footage of action heroes, gaming sequences, and even hard-hitting...

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Pearl Harbor comment leaves Japan PM Takaichi speechless | Watch Video
dailyNews.description: Responding to a question on why allies were not informed in advance, Trump emphasised the element of surprise in military operations. “We wanted surprise. Who knows better about surprise than Japan? Why didn't you tell me about Pearl Harbor?” Trump said.

dailyNews.title: Airfares on US airlines have shot up due to the war with Iran, as jet fuel costs rise, but travel demand remains strong
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel’s war in Iran has pushed airlines to raise fares amid soaring jet fuel costs and airspace disruptions. Despite higher prices, travel demand remains strong, with rising ticket values and multiple record sales days reported by major US carriers.

dailyNews.title: Assam Assembly elections 2026: Pradyut factor in Congress’s third list of candidates
dailyNews.description: The Asom Gana Parishad (AGP), one of the BJP’s three regional allies, announced its first and final list of 26 candidates

dailyNews.title: Iran conflict looms large over Trump's meeting with Japan PM
dailyNews.description: The meeting with Sanae Takaichi comes days after Trump criticised Japan for not answering his demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump references Pearl Harbor during meeting with Japanese PM on Iran war
dailyNews.description: US president said that Japan was 'stepping up to the plate' to support the US war without offering details.

dailyNews.title: Supreme privilege to touch the sacred dust of Ayodhya, says President Murmu
dailyNews.description: Embracing the principles of Ram Rajya, we can construct a nation grounded in morality and ethical conduct, the President says

dailyNews.title: HDFC Bank ADRs crash another 4% after sharp selloff, hinting at more losses on Friday
dailyNews.description: HDFC Bank's US-listed shares dipped further following the former chairman's sudden resignation, citing ethical concerns. Despite management's reassurances and a lack of specific details, investors remain cautious. Analysts, however, see the stock correction as a potential buying opportunity, emphasizing the bank's strong fundamentals and leadership continuity over perceived tactical differences.

dailyNews.title: Trump meets Japan PM Sanae Takaichi at White House amid US-Iran war, Hormuz Strait crisis: What's on agenda?
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump welcomed Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi to the White House on Thursday for a summit. Takaichi's visit comes amid tensions in the Middle East after the US and Israel launched a war with Iran. Here's what's expected from the meeting.

dailyNews.title: Chhattisgarh Assembly passes new anti-conversion Bill with stricter provisions
dailyNews.description: The Bill mandates life imprisonment and fines up to ₹25 lakh in specific cases; Congress MLAs raise objections, call for broader consultations, and seek the handing over of the Bill to a ‘Select Committee’

dailyNews.title: Hegseth drops blunt line: ‘It takes money to kill bad guys’ amid Pentagon seeking $200 billion more for Iran war effort
dailyNews.description: As the Trump administration weighs its military and diplomatic options, lawmakers are making clear that any funding approval will require detailed justification, strategic clarity, and sustained engagement with Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump hails Operation Epic Fury: ‘Did what no president had the courage to do’
dailyNews.description: Trump said Iran’s navy, air force and leadership have been “gone,” adding that US forces face virtually no opposition.

dailyNews.title: Senegal instruct lawyers, while CAF’s Motsepe defends Morocco’s AFCON award
dailyNews.description: Senegal football calls in lawyers as CAS awaits, while CAF president defends decision to hand AFCON title to Morocco.

dailyNews.title: California, New York and 6 other states sue to block $6.2 bn Nexstar-Tegna deal: Why Trump-backed merger faces trouble
dailyNews.description: California, New York and six other US states filed a lawsuit on Wednesday, seeking to block the proposed $6.2 billion deal between Nexstar and rival Tegna. US President Donald Trump has voiced support for the deal. Here's all you need to know.

dailyNews.title: 'The View' co-host Joy Behar unloads on Fetterman for backing Trump's DHS pick
dailyNews.description: "The View" co-host Joy Behar slammed Sen. John Fetterman for backing President Donald Trump's Department of Homeland Security pick, Sen. Markwayne Mullin.

dailyNews.title: Trump rates Macron 'an 8' as France and US split over Middle East strategy
dailyNews.description: Macron calls for Middle East de-escalation while Trump and Israel push military pressure against Iran, exposing growing diplomatic rifts over regional strategy.

dailyNews.title: Pentagon Seeks Additional $200 Billion to Fund Iran War
dailyNews.description: The request, which the White House has not yet submitted to Congress, is already encountering some resistance.

dailyNews.title: Trump Jokes About Pearl Harbor in Meeting With Japan’s Leader
dailyNews.description: Breaking a taboo, President Trump needled Japan’s prime minister about the World War II attack, as she widened her eyes and appeared to take a deep breath in the Oval Office.

dailyNews.title: Lawsuit Accuses Justice Dept. Leadership of ‘Political Retribution’
dailyNews.description: The suit filed by two fired F.B.I. agents aimed to hold the Trump administration accountable for the purge of personnel who had worked on the investigations of Mr. Trump or his allies.

dailyNews.title: A Gift From Trump to the Supreme Court
dailyNews.description: In a caustic critique of the court issued on social media late Sunday night, the president inadvertently buttressed its independence.

dailyNews.title: Can Military Excellence Save Us From Trump’s Incompetence?
dailyNews.description: It should never have come to this.

dailyNews.title: Comey subpoenaed in conspiracy case against ex-officials who investigated Trump
dailyNews.description: Former FBI Director James Comey has been subpoenaed by prosecutors in Miami as part of the Justice Department's investigation into Obama-era intelligence officials.
